title: Photo gallery: Spring 2026
summary_en: Spring at the University of Missouri showcases why it's one of the most beautiful campuses in the nation. See photos of some of that springtime beauty.

title: From pet to pest: Invasive goldfish are reshaping freshwater ecosystems, researchers warn
summary_en: A new study finds goldfish released into the wild can trigger rapid ecological collapse in lakes, threatening native species throughout the food web.
title_cn: 研究人员警告：从宠物到有害生物 入侵物种金鱼正在重塑淡水生态系统

title: Honors College students take a swing at America’s favorite pastime
summary_en: Honors College course includes nine 'innings' exploring a different moment in baseball history.
title_cn: 荣誉学院学生挥棒体验美国最受欢迎的休闲运动

title: Mizzou advanced technology core facilities drive innovation and discovery
summary_en: See how shared resources help faculty turn ideas into real-world solutions.
title_cn: 密苏里大学先进技术核心设施推动创新与探索

title: Mizzou honors distinguished alumni, introduces new philanthropy award
summary_en: Recipients recognized for exemplary achievement, service and impact; Walsworth family receives inaugural philanthropic honor.
title_cn: 密苏里大学表彰杰出校友并设立全新公益慈善奖项

title: Show Me Research Week highlights student work from across campus
title_cn: 科研成果展示周集中呈现全校学生作品

title: What to know about spring commencement 2026
summary_en: Tips to help you make the most of your visit to campus this graduation season.

title: Mizzou archaeologist digs up long‑buried Roman secrets
summary_en: Marcello Mogetta balances excavations of ancient cities in Italy with classroom instruction, helping students and fellow researchers better understand the Roman Empire and its legacy.
title_cn: 密苏里大学哥伦比亚分校考古学者发掘尘封已久的古罗马秘密
